description: Add artifact collection to factory run records, persist collected artifacts in the factory store for local and sandbox executions, and expose a safe human-readable and JSON CLI surface for inspecting collected artifacts.

userStories.title: Extend factory run records with artifact metadata
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want run records to include artifact metadata so that later commands and automation can discover what was collected.
acceptanceCriteria: Factory run records include an artifacts collection with stable fields for artifact ID or name, type or category, source path, stored path, size when known, created timestamp when known, optional summary metadata, and warning state when collection was partial
Existing run records without artifact metadata load successfully
Artifact JSON fields are omitted or empty only where that matches the existing factory run record contract style
Run record JSON serialization does not include raw secret values or uncontracted network addresses
Focused tests cover marshal and unmarshal compatibility for run records with artifacts
Focused tests cover marshal and unmarshal compatibility for run records without artifacts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add factory store artifact persistence APIs
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want collected artifacts stored under the factory store so that artifacts remain available independently of the project .hal directory.
acceptanceCriteria: Artifact files are written under internal/factory.Store storage rooted in the global sandbox config factory store
Per-run artifact paths are deterministic and scoped by run ID
Artifact writes do not create new persistent state under the project .hal directory
Store APIs expose functionality to save artifact metadata for a run
Store APIs expose functionality to resolve stored artifact paths for a run
Tests use temporary store roots and assert artifact files are written under the factory store root
Tests assert no artifact files are written under a project .hal directory
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create local artifact file collection
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want local factory runs to copy available report and log artifacts into the factory store so that I can inspect run evidence after completion or failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Local artifact collection can include .hal/reports files when present
Local artifact collection can include auto JSON result files when present
Local artifact collection can include verification output files when present
Local artifact collection can include factory log files when present
Each collected file or directory is copied or materialized into the factory store and recorded in run artifact metadata
Missing optional files are recorded as warnings and do not fail artifact collection
Required store write errors fail artifact collection with a wrapped actionable error
Tests cover successful collection of representative local report and log artifacts
Tests cover missing optional local artifacts producing warnings without returning a hard failure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Capture status and doctor snapshots
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want status and doctor snapshots collected as artifacts so that I can see the readiness and workflow state observed during the run.
acceptanceCriteria: Factory collection can materialize status snapshot output into a stored artifact
Factory collection can materialize doctor snapshot output into a stored artifact
Snapshot collection uses existing stable command or package extension points rather than parsing terminal-only output where structured data is available
Status snapshot artifact metadata identifies the snapshot kind and includes summary status when available
Doctor snapshot artifact metadata identifies the snapshot kind and includes summary status when available
Tests use injectable dependencies for status snapshot generation
Tests use injectable dependencies for doctor snapshot generation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Capture PR and CI outcome artifacts
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want PR URL and CI status captured so that I can audit run outcomes from one place.
acceptanceCriteria: PR URL is recorded as artifact summary metadata or as a small stored artifact when available
CI status is recorded as artifact summary metadata or as a stored artifact when available
PR URL and CI status collection do not store raw secrets
PR URL and CI status collection do not expose raw uncontracted network addresses in machine-readable output
Missing PR data produces a warning and does not fail completed or failed run persistence
Missing CI data produces a warning and does not fail completed or failed run persistence
Tests cover present PR or CI data being recorded
Tests cover missing PR or CI data producing a warning without returning a hard failure
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add sandbox artifact copy abstraction
userStories.description: As a factory maintainer, I want a sandbox copy abstraction so that sandbox run artifacts can be copied back into the local factory store without depending on provider-specific internals.
acceptanceCriteria: A sandbox artifact collection interface or dependency struct supports copying files from a remote workspace into a local destination
A sandbox artifact collection interface or dependency struct supports copying directories from a remote workspace into a local destination
Factory sandbox collection code depends on the abstraction rather than concrete provider internals
The abstraction supports fake implementations in tests
Remote artifact paths are treated as inputs to the copy abstraction and are not exposed in JSON output beyond explicit safe contract fields
Copy failures for expected artifacts return actionable errors
Missing optional remote artifacts produce warnings when the fake or provider can distinguish that case
Tests cover fake copy success
Tests cover fake missing optional artifact behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Collect sandbox run artifacts
userStories.description: As a factory user, I want sandbox runs to expose artifacts just like local runs so that remote execution remains inspectable after completion or failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Sandbox factory runs invoke the sandbox artifact collection abstraction at the run finalization point
Copied sandbox artifacts are stored under the local factory store
Copied sandbox artifacts are recorded in run metadata
Completed sandbox runs expose collected artifacts
Failed sandbox runs expose artifacts that were available before failure
Tests use fake sandbox copy dependencies and do not require a real sandbox provider
Tests do not require network access
Tests cover sandbox collection success
Tests cover missing optional sandbox artifacts producing warnings without failing run persistence
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add human-readable factory artifacts command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to list artifacts for a factory run so that I can inspect paths and summary metadata without opening store files manually.
acceptanceCriteria: hal factory artifacts <run-id> lists collected artifact paths for the requested run
hal factory artifacts <run-id> lists summary metadata for the requested run when available
The command returns a clear error when the run ID does not exist
The command handles runs with no collected artifacts by printing an explicit empty-state message
The command follows existing cmd/factory.go command patterns with injectable dependencies for tests
Command tests cover successful artifact listing
Command tests cover missing run errors
Command tests cover empty artifact list output
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add JSON output for factory artifacts
userStories.description: As an automation author, I want hal factory artifacts <run-id> --json to return documented structured output so that tooling can consume artifact metadata safely.
acceptanceCriteria: hal factory artifacts <run-id> --json emits a stable JSON payload with run ID, artifact entries, warnings, and summary metadata
JSON output redacts secrets
JSON output does not expose raw uncontracted network addresses
JSON contract documentation is added or updated under docs/contracts
Example JSON payloads are added or updated
Contract tests lock key names and required fields for the artifact JSON surface
Documentation-code sync tests cover the new or updated contract
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update factory command metadata and CLI docs
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want generated docs and command help to describe the new artifacts command so that the feature is discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: hal factory artifacts has complete Cobra metadata including Use, Short, Long, and Example
Factory command metadata tests include the new artifacts command
Generated CLI docs are updated for the new artifacts command
Docs check passes with the generated artifacts committed
README or relevant CLI reference links remain consistent if factory command tables are present
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
